---
DisableTestHistory
RecentChanges: no
Static
---
!define GeVo {gevo-form:j_id_3a:vn-beruf_input}
!define GrundAuswahlbox {gevo-starten-form:grund_label}
!define GrundAenderung {gevo-starten-form:grund_2}
!define gueltigAb {gevo-starten-form:gueltig-ab_input}
!define GeVoStarten {gevo-starten-form:gevo-starten}
